implemented: Yahoo S5 evaluation: AUC 0.5000, T1 NOT supported
Cleaned cli.py imports after patch conflicts
finding: Yahoo S5 evaluated with AUC 0.5000 (at chance). T1 NOT supported. Neural prediction achieves near-baseline parity (gap -0.0002) but anomaly calibration is at chance level — the model cannot distinguish anomalies from normal web traffic data. Consistent with EVO-031 finding that stable experts own the forecast floor.
decision: Reject T1 support for Yahoo S5. Phase 2 has 2/3 families (NAB, UCR confirmed; Yahoo S5 rejected). Consider additional families or accept Phase 2 completion with 2 strong families.
non_claim_lock: Yahoo S5 T1 not supported. Neural anomaly calibration at chance level on web traffic data. This does not establish general transfer limitation — only that Yahoo S5's anomaly structure is not detectable by the current calibration approach.
